expectations.text: Skill triggers: Claude invokes or follows the teaching-session skill
expectations.evidence: No skill invoked; Claude proceeded as general assistant. Baseline agent itself noted 0 PASS, 1 PARTIAL, 5 FAIL.

expectations.text: Session start: Claude reads teacher/ files (persona, learner_profile, session_log, knowledge_gaps)
expectations.evidence: No teacher/ files read; persona and learner context taken from prompt description only

expectations.text: Lesson meta.yaml: Claude looks for multi-layer-networks/meta.yaml and checks its depends entries
expectations.evidence: meta.yaml not read or checked; no prerequisite check performed

expectations.text: Notebook in lesson dir: Session notebook is created inside the lesson directory, not in blackboard/
expectations.evidence: No notebook created at all; no Jupyter MCP tools invoked

expectations.text: Socratic greet: Claude greets in persona voice (not as generic assistant)
expectations.evidence: Persona voice adopted but without reading session_log, greet had no reference to previous linear algebra session (PARTIAL per baseline agent's own scoring)

expectations.text: Session end updates: Claude indicates it will update meta.yaml status, session_log.md, and knowledge_gaps.md at session end
expectations.evidence: Described what would need to happen in notes but did not perform any updates
